shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Mostly Cloudy
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Rain showers and areas of fog before 9pm, then a slight chance of rain between 9pm and 10pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34. West wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
